TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ibuh ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 164 buwan, 583 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 554 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 29 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 83%, Amis 2%, Tayan 3%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. qalang Ibuh ga ungat pqwasan biru. qalang Ibuh ga ungat kyokay. qalang Ibuh ga ungat hasisyo. qalang Ibuh ga ungat ngasal sexu. qalang Ibuh ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Ibuh ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ibuh hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ibuh hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ibuh hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ibuh hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Ibuh hya' ga Kulu. tay mkyahu' na Ibuh hya' ga Dowmung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ iβuħ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. qalaŋ iβuħ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ iβuħ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. qalaŋ iβuħ ɣa uŋat ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ iβuħ ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ iβuħ ɣa uŋat kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. qalaŋ iβuħ ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal pkita nβu. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na iβuħ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na iβuħ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na iβuħ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na iβuħ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na iβuħ ħjaʔ ɣa kulu. taj mkjaħuʔ na iβuħ ħjaʔ ɣa *owmuŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ibuh ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 164 buwan, 583 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 554 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 29 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 83%, Amis 2%, Tayan 3%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. qalang Ibuh ga ungat pqwasan biru. qalang Ibuh ga ungat kyokay. qalang Ibuh ga ungat hasisyo. qalang Ibuh ga ungat ngasal sexu. qalang Ibuh ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Ibuh ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ibuh hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ibuh hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ibuh hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ibuh hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Ibuh hya' ga Kulu. tay mkyahu' na Ibuh hya' ga Dowmung. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ iβuħ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. qalaŋ iβuħ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ iβuħ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. qalaŋ iβuħ ɣa uŋat ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ iβuħ ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ iβuħ ɣa uŋat kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. qalaŋ iβuħ ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal pkita nβu. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na iβuħ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na iβuħ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na iβuħ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na iβuħ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na iβuħ ħjaʔ ɣa kulu. taj mkjaħuʔ na iβuħ ħjaʔ ɣa *owmuŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
